meaning: adj.[口]时髦地,豪华的,漂亮的,优雅的,极好的
examples: This posh, smart, classy profession is a favorite in movies.
They live in the posh part of town.
You look very posh in your new suit.
And Frecklington is confident he can force his way into the Posh first team.
Posh boss Darren Ferguson attempted to bring him to London Road back in January 2008.
